ItacPersonItem.Notes: Among the founders of Accademia degli Accesi. the bibliography on this author has increased particularly thanks to the studies of Laura Ricco`. See the critical edition of Scipione Bargagli, I Trattenimenti, ed. Laura Ricco` (Rome, 1989), and Ricco`, `La "Miniera" Accademica` (Rome, 2002), which suggests the two pseudonyms. For his biography, see the entry by Nino Borsellino in DBI, and Laura Ricco`, in I Trattenimenti. Bargagli`s debut is the poem `S`alcuno e` ancor in questo mondo frale`, which he signed as Academico Acceso, in Poesie Toscane et Latine di diversi eccel.mi ingegni... (Florence: Torrentino, 1563).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
